prompt: I have the blueprint and call flowchart ready for Bright Smile Dental. The blueprint says it's an inbound receptionist agent on Vapi. Build the prototype agent for me.

assertions.text: Explicitly asks the user to confirm platform (Vapi/Livekit) before building
Explicitly asks the user to confirm direction (inbound/outbound/both) before building
Does NOT immediately start building without asking — waits for user confirmation
References .docx output for system prompt and/or demo instructions
References the Guardrails section or 35 non-negotiable rules when discussing system prompt
